examples: We don't know of any other species that USES its body like a flail.
Some people keep too still while speaking, while others flail all over the place.
The flail is often not used today, but in the past it was indispensable for grinding crops.
Sometimes -- often -- I grimace and panic, look wildly about as I totter and flail.
The Big Four global accounting firms make money whether clients survive and thrive or flail and fail.
